description: Digital lux meter verifying illuminance at the examination surface: handheld meter body w/ LCD (visible from start), coiled cord (draw), remote dome photodetector lying flat on a steel plate beside a weld bead, work lamp + beam cone, WORKING DISTANCE dimension, LCD readout '500 lx', pings on sensor + readout, darkest-spot ring over the shadowed nozzle-bore recess.
